item.name: Atamra Cichlid
item.description:
The red of this tropical wavekin is reminiscent of a certain fruit.

[Suitable for display in aquariums tier 2 and higher.]
[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: A fish that likes to travel in schools which, with their bright coloration, resemble ripe amra swaying in the breeze. When spawning, it keeps its eggs stuffed safely in its mouth like so many seeds of the aforementioned fruit.
